---
title: 4. Finite Elemente für Plattentragwerke
format:
    revealjs: default
engine: julia
---

{{< include ../../definitionen.qmd >}}

{{< include 01-anfang.qmd >}}

{{< include 02-plattentheorie.qmd >}}

{{< include 03-finite-elemente-1.qmd >}}

{{< include 03-finite-elemente-2.qmd >}}

{{< include 04-weitere-aspekte.qmd >}}

{{< include 05-ende.qmd >}}
